interfaces.name: ProcessingStage
interfaces.signature: enum ProcessingStage: String, Codable { case queued, extracting, summarizing, diffing, ready, partial, failed }
interfaces.notes: Persisted flat on Meeting/DigestItem. Rich ProcessingState (with completeness/failure payloads) is a computed, non-persisted view built from this + completenessNote/missingSections/failureReason — never store an associated-value enum directly in SwiftData.

interfaces.name: ChangeType
interfaces.signature: enum ChangeType: String, Codable { case new, amended, removed, postponed, firstDigest }
interfaces.notes: Drives ChangeBadge shape+icon+color per design tokens.

interfaces.name: FollowedSource
interfaces.signature: @Model final class FollowedSource { var id: UUID; var name: String; var jurisdictionType: String; var locationText: String; var sourceURL: String?; var lastSyncedAt: Date?; var lastSyncStatus: String; var notificationCadence: NotificationCadence; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: notificationCadence gated by EntitlementStore.canEnableNotifications when != .off.

interfaces.name: NotificationCadence
interfaces.signature: enum NotificationCadence: String, Codable { case off, daily, weekly, instant }

interfaces.name: Meeting
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Meeting { var id: UUID; var source: FollowedSource; var date: Date; var title: String; var agendaPDFFilename: String?; var minutesPDFFilename: String?; var stage: ProcessingStage }
interfaces.notes: PDF binaries never stored in SwiftData — filenames key into PDFFileStore on disk.

interfaces.name: DigestItem
interfaces.signature: @Model final class DigestItem { var id: String; var meeting: Meeting; var sectionIndex: Int; var title: String; var summary: String; var changeType: ChangeType; var stage: ProcessingStage; var completenessNote: String?; var missingSections: [String]; var failureReason: String?; var originalText: String; var priorVersion: DigestItem? }
interfaces.notes: id MUST be deterministic "\(sourceID)-\(meetingID)-\(agendaItemNumberOrSectionIndex)", never array position — required for stable ForEach identity across reprocessing.

interfaces.name: DiffRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class DiffRecord { var id: UUID; var digestItem: DigestItem; var spans: [DiffSpan]; var computedAt: Date }

interfaces.name: DiffSpan
interfaces.signature: struct DiffSpan: Codable { enum Kind: String, Codable { case unchanged, added, removed }; let kind: Kind; let text: String }
interfaces.notes: Element type of DiffEngine.diff output; stored as Codable/JSON column in DiffRecord.spans.

interfaces.name: DiffEngine.diff
interfaces.signature: enum DiffEngine { static func diff(old: String, new: String) -> [DiffSpan] }
interfaces.notes: Pure, zero dependency on SwiftData/Summarizer. Myers-diff-style over extracted text. Fully unit-testable against fixture pairs.

interfaces.name: SummarizerService
interfaces.signature: protocol SummarizerService { func summarize(sectionText: String) async throws -> String }
interfaces.notes: ExtractiveSummarizer (deterministic, always available) and FoundationModelsSummarizer (gated by Apple Intelligence eligibility) both conform. ProcessingCoordinator depends only on this protocol.

interfaces.name: ProcessingCoordinator
interfaces.signature: @ModelActor actor ProcessingCoordinator { func process(meetingID: PersistentIdentifier, summarizer: SummarizerService) async }
interfaces.notes: Off-main actor. Writes live stage ticks to ProcessingStatusBoard (not SwiftData); commits final DigestItem/DiffRecord only at terminal states. Must run a reconciliation pass at app launch: any persisted non-terminal ProcessingStage is requeued, never left stuck.

interfaces.name: ProcessingStatusBoard
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class ProcessingStatusBoard { private(set) var stages: [String: ProcessingStage]; func update(id: String, stage: ProcessingStage) }
interfaces.notes: In-memory only, keyed by DigestItem/Meeting id. Views bind here for progress UI so SwiftData/@Query never re-renders on every intermediate tick.

interfaces.name: PDFExtractor
interfaces.signature: struct PDFExtractor { func extractText(fileURL: URL) async throws -> ExtractionResult }
interfaces.notes: PDFKit text layer first; falls back to OCRExtractor per page when a page has no text layer.

interfaces.name: OCRExtractor
interfaces.signature: struct OCRExtractor { func recognizeText(pageImage: CGImage) async throws -> String }
interfaces.notes: Wraps VNRecognizeTextRequest. Per-page failures surface as DigestItem.missingSections entries, not a whole-document failure.

interfaces.name: ExtractionResult
interfaces.signature: struct ExtractionResult { let sections: [(title: String, text: String)]; let unreadablePageIndices: [Int] }

interfaces.name: PDFFileStore
interfaces.signature: struct PDFFileStore { func save(data: Data) throws -> String; func url(for filename: String) -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Documents/PDFs/<uuid>.pdf on disk; SwiftData models hold only the filename string.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class EntitlementStore { private(set) var isPlus: Bool; func canFollowAdditionalSource(currentCount: Int) -> Bool; var canViewHistoryBeyondMostRecent: Bool { get }; var canEnableNotifications: Bool { get } }
interfaces.notes: Backed by StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements, checked fully offline. Free: max 2 sources, current+1 prior meeting history, no notifications. Docket Plus: unlimited sources, full history, notifications.

interfaces.name: FollowingFeedModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class FollowingFeedModel { var groupedSources: [SourceDigestGroup]; func refresh() async }
interfaces.notes: Groups DigestItems by FollowedSource; distinguishes empty-before-follow vs. 'all caught up' (followed, zero unread) as separate rendered states.

interfaces.name: SourceDigestGroup
interfaces.signature: struct SourceDigestGroup: Identifiable { let id: UUID; let source: FollowedSource; let items: [DigestItem]; let hasUnread: Bool }

interfaces.name: AddSourceModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AddSourceModel { var results: [JurisdictionDirectoryEntry]; func search(query: String) async; func follow(_ entry: JurisdictionDirectoryEntry) throws; func importPDF(url: URL) async throws }
interfaces.notes: follow(_:) throws EntitlementError.sourceCapReached when EntitlementStore.canFollowAdditionalSource is false, caught by the view to present PaywallView.

interfaces.name: JurisdictionDirectoryEntry
interfaces.signature: struct JurisdictionDirectoryEntry: Identifiable, Codable { let id: String; let name: String; let jurisdictionType: String; let locationText: String; let sourceURL: String? }
interfaces.notes: Loaded from a bundled JSON directory shipped in the app — never hits network, so Onboarding/Add Source search has no true error state.

interfaces.name: SourceDetailModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class SourceDetailModel { var meetings: [Meeting]; var visibleHistory: [Meeting] { get }; func retrySync() async }
interfaces.notes: visibleHistory truncated to current+1 prior meeting unless EntitlementStore.canViewHistoryBeyondMostRecent.

interfaces.name: DigestItemDetailModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class DigestItemDetailModel { var item: DigestItem; var diff: [DiffSpan]?; func retryProcessing() async }

interfaces.name: PaywallView
interfaces.signature: struct PaywallView: View { let trigger: PaywallTrigger }
interfaces.notes: One sheet, one message, regardless of which of the three gates triggered it — trigger only changes headline copy.

interfaces.name: PaywallTrigger
interfaces.signature: enum PaywallTrigger { case sourceCap, history, notifications }

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: struct NotificationScheduler { func requestAuthorizationIfNeeded() async -> Bool; func schedule(for source: FollowedSource) async }
interfaces.notes: Requested contextually after first source followed + cadence set, never at launch; no-ops if EntitlementStore.canEnableNotifications is false.
